nodes.label: BIPS - Bluetooth Indoor Positioning System
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Design and Analysis of a Bluetooth-Based Indoor Localization System : Lecture Notes in Comp.pdf
nodes.rationale: BIPS integrates Bluetooth device discovery (inquiry procedures) into existing Bluetooth access point network infrastructure to provide cost-effective positioning without dedicated sensors.
